body.title: Granny + DickSimnel shim.py: add method docstrings
body.result: docstrings on all lifecycle methods in dicksimnel/shim.py + granny/shim.py + _session_exists
body.intention: I intend that every method in both shim.py files has a one-line docstring so the lifecycle contract is self-documenting.
body.description:
devices/dicksimnel/shim.py and devices/granny/shim.py implement the BaseShim lifecycle (start/stop/restart/rollback/self_test). Most methods lack docstrings: dicksimnel/shim.py is missing 8, granny/shim.py is missing 9. A shim is the first file a new contributor reads to understand a device — missing docstrings here make the lifecycle opaque.

**Affected files:** devices/dicksimnel/shim.py, devices/granny/shim.py
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code; one short line per method; no multi-line blocks
**Scope boundary:** In scope: docstrings on all methods in both shim.py files. Out of scope: type hints, logic changes, other device shims.
**Completion criteria:** All methods in both files have docstrings. Checked via: `python3 -c "import ast; [print(f) for f in ['devices/dicksimnel/shim.py','devices/granny/shim.py'] for n in ast.walk(ast.parse(open(f).read())) if isinstance(n,(ast.FunctionDef,ast.AsyncFunctionDef)) and not (n.body and isinstance(n.body[0],ast.Expr))]"` produces no output.
